scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'test -n "$DATABASE_URL" || { echo "DATABASE_URL is required"; exit 1; }; psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f apps/api/db/migrations/0001_init.sql'
scripts.db:seed: sh -c 'test -n "$DATABASE_URL" || { echo "DATABASE_URL is required"; exit 1; }; psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f apps/api/db/seed/0001_mock_seed.sql'
